audio_description: The audio features a male voice speaking in a neutral tone, with no significant prosody or background noise.
temporal_description: Two men are seated across from each other at a dark table in a dimly lit room. The man on the left, wearing a dark suit, holds a cigarette and occasionally exhales smoke, while the man on the right, also in a dark suit and wearing glasses, sits with his hands clasped on the table. The camera focuses on the man on the left, showing his face in close-up as he looks downward and then slightly upward, with smoke drifting around him. Both appear to be engaged in a still, quiet interaction, with minimal movement.
